2026-0577
2026-06-11TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Montréal Port AuthorityAppointment of Mathieu Bouchard of Montréal, Quebec, to be a director of the Montréal Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, in the place of John Edward Parisella, C.M., O.Q., whose term has expired.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Montréal Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Mathieu Bouchard of Montréal, Quebec, to be a director of the Montréal Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, in the place of John Edward Parisella, C.M., O.Q., whose term has expired.
